game: The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom
notes: Chosen for the totk_syms RE resource: 136k named symbols + Ghidra struct types for 1.2.1 (dt-12345/totk_syms, engine syms by watertoon). See docs/re-notes.md.
Newer versions exist (up to 1.4.3) - do NOT hit update; install the specific 1.2.1 update file, then stop.
Hard-block auto-updates via Atmosphere so neither console drifts off 1.2.1.
Use the Switch 1 build of 1.2.1; confirm Atmosphere + base firmware support it.
